_note: Template for a FREE event-pass store (guest_list fulfilment). Provision with: node scripts/provision-event.mjs events/free-event-demo.json --owner <auth-user-uuid>. No payment, no mint, no redemption codes: the pass is a confirmed place on app_event_guests that the organiser admits people from (or exports into their own free Luma). Humans claim by creating a Buying Agent at /events/<slug>; agents claim via claim_pass on the per-seller MCP. Copy this file per event and change slug/name/tiers.
name: Free Event Demo
headline: Claim your free pass. For agents and humans.
description: A free event on VIA. Claiming a pass creates your VIA Buying Agent, an AI agent that can find and buy for you across the network. There is nothing to pay.

fulfilment._note: guest_list = free RSVP. No Luma API key needed; VIA records the guest list and the organiser admits from it (or imports the CSV export into their free Luma).

redemption.instructions: Bring the email address you signed up with. The organiser will have you on the guest list at the door.

concierge_facts.title: Is it free
concierge_facts.body: Yes. Entry is free. There is no payment and no code to redeem. You get a confirmed place on the guest list.

concierge_facts.title: Getting in
concierge_facts.body: Bring the email you signed up with. The organiser admits guests from the VIA guest list.

tiers.title: General Admission
tiers.includes: Free general entry to the event.
